allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process OneDrive -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id; Get-ItemProperty ''HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\OneDrive'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object UserFolder; ls $env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\OneDriveSetup.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls $env:SystemRoot\\System32\\OneDriveSetup.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls $env:SystemRoot\\SysWOW64\\OneDriveSetup.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
